Name: search_news_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"($1) AS "_fn_search_news") SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'news_aggregate', 'aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'news_aggregate_fields', 'count', COUNT(*), 'max', json_build_object('title', MAX("title"), '__typename', 'news_max_fields'), 'min', json_build_object('title', MIN("title"), '__typename', 'news_min_fields')) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT 'news' AS "__typename", "_root.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "search_news_aggregate"
